title: cytisus leucanthus var. subnudus
intro: Cytisus leucanthus var. subnudus, also known as the lesser or dwarf broom, is a variety of broom plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Cytisus leucanthus var. subnudus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies and supplements.
